text.message: my mistake I will trust MrWarmth from here on out
please Id rather trade that making a settle here
it is the only brick on all the board
frankly I thought blue would go 3411 for the brick instead of 8-10 port
No I see but still when you're offering that's pretty rough
you have to make 4:1 to get a brick
It's probably better for you that I did
If I give 3for1 in your turn, it is a great deal for you
In my turn I can be generous and give 2for1
i got this sheep with 4 wood haha
It was a great deal for you
I have not gotten a card in three orbits lol
yeah because your second settle was a port
it has more production than the 3/4/11
and stopped black from winning the game
but brick was kind of useful right?
yeah but I had one road to 9/10
idk that i had a guaranteed win setup
the 8/10 3:1 is such a good spot I was worrieed
I disagree with your first settle tbh, blue, much better was 6910 for you, almost guaranteed win imo
no because that opens up the 10/8/5
I thought the same thing at first
the spot that I grabbed overall gave me better production and I would end up with the same issue, except with wood instead of brick
except with the scarcity of brick its worth way more to trade
I agree, i thought i'd have an easier time getting this first settle
but whou would trade you brick?
3:1 with hay. It's just been blocked the entire time
I thought I could get the first settle fairly quickly and it would no longer be a problem
and these players are not so used to trade imo
wow why am i in a diamond lobby lol
i have played like 15 games total
I guess you've been winning a ton lol
orange and black are leading imo
yeah red has road + open settle for 8
I'm caught in the cross fire of all of the blocks
game might be over soon with those dev cards
I need a sheep and a wheat to plow orange
was not aware that you had the road builder
need this to ploow orange to extend the game
I have the hay but not the sheep
just extending the game tbh, he can win without it
He's taken 11 ore from me with two monos lol
he only has one dev now tbf
but if we hadnt plowed him, I think he would have won
yeah that was a good move
whatever happens, this was a good game
blue and orange, tell us your devs
red you're getting no rolls rn
all blocks are against black now
it doesnt matter you dont get a card
he plays a knight and wins
red definitely couldve been the block
imagine they had 3 more wheat rn
got the rolls at the end
